role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script (Latin), language (English/Zulu), and company naming conventions ('Pty (Ltd)').
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color (red oxisol), vegetation types (Jacaranda, Aloe, Eucalyptus), and climate indicators.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Jacaranda mimosifolia, Aloe species) and their regional associations.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated the 'Pty (Ltd)' legal structure and infrastructure styles (brick, fencing).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like building style, utility poles, and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided concrete evidence grounded in the image, and correctly identified the unique combination of linguistic ('Pty (Ltd)', 'Khulani') and botanical (Jacaranda + Aloe + Red Soil) markers that point to South Africa. The tournament correctly prioritized these strong signals.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified visible text and script.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted South Africa.
